sentences.arabic: كَانَ وَلِيدٌ يَسْتَمِعُ إِلَى الْأُغْنِيَاتِ بِسَمَّاعَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Walid je slušao pjesme u slušalicama.
sentences.translationEn: Walid was listening to songs with his headphones.

sentences.translation: Brat ga je upitao: Šta slušaš?
sentences.translationEn: His brother asked him: What are you listening to?

sentences.translation: Walid je uzeo jednu slušalicu i dao je bratu.
sentences.translationEn: Walid took one headphone and gave it to his brother.

sentences.translation: Slušali su pjesmu zajedno i uživali.
sentences.translationEn: They listened to the song together and enjoyed it.
